name: Haselnusstorte (Hazelnut Torte)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks and sugar together until very light in color, about 5 minutes.
2. Gradually add water while continuing to beat.
3. Sift cake flour and baking powder into a bowl.
4. Mix with 1 cup of ground hazelnuts (Filberts).
5. Gently fold the dry mixture into the egg yolk mixture.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
7. Fold beaten whites into the batter in two additions, ensuring no large pockets remain.
8. Grease and flour a 10-inch springform pan.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
10. Allow cake to cool on a wire rack completely.
11. Once cooled, split the cake into two layers.
12. Fold vanilla extract, confectioners' sugar, and remaining nuts into whipped cream.
13. Spread whipped cream between cake layers and over top of the cake.
14. Refrigerate until serving time.
15. Garnish with fresh strawberry slices if desired.
